Done. Here's what was wrong and what I changed:

**Root cause:** The viewport culling in `/mnt/data/terminal/graph.html` (added in commit `695ac71`) permanently hid nodes because `graphNetwork.getPositions()` does not return position data for nodes that have `hidden: true`. When a node was culled (hidden), the guard `if (!pos) return` on line 989 would skip it on every subsequent cull pass, making it impossible to ever un-hide. The node would also fall out of the `culledNodeIds` tracking set, so...(truncated)
